headline: Guggenheim Maintains Buy on Regeneron Pharmaceuticals, Raises Price Target to $1000
summary: Guggenheim  analyst Brad Canino   maintains Regeneron Pharmaceuticals (NASDAQ:REGN) with a Buy and raises the price target from $995 to $1000.
